title: Super Mario World
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Platformer game.

A small agile explorer in side view in a bright side-scrolling course with rounded grassy hills, chunky ledges, and a clear path of platforms rising upward, caught in a clean forward leap from one ledge to the next.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second
- exactly one primary focal subject
- no crowd, no collage, no multi-character scene

Style:
- SNES aesthetic, rich pixel art, layered backgrounds, soft gradients, and readable 16-bit atmosphere
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- bright, playful, nimble

Composition:
- single explorer only, side-view read, one jump arc, rounded hill backdrop, and no crowd or decorative clutter
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark

Important - do NOT include: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Mario likeness, avoid mustache and cap codes, avoid official enemy silhouettes, avoid exact pipe or block layouts, avoid resemblance to mario. No copyrighted characters, no logos, no recognizable IP.
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Mario likeness, avoid mustache and cap codes, avoid official enemy silhouettes, avoid exact pipe or block layouts, avoid resemblance to mario
revised_prompt: Create an illustration inspired by retro platformer games. The image should center on a single subject: an agile explorer in the midst of a jumping motion. The character should be captured in side view, against the backdrop of a vibrant, side-scrolling course with rounded, grassy hills, and chunky ledges. The path must be dominated by rising platforms. Maintain a SNES aesthetic—with rich pixel art, layered backgrounds, soft gradients, and a palpable 16-bit atmosphere. Stay faithful to the limitations associated with that era, but provide a modern, clean touch to it. The overall mood should radiate brightness, playfulness, and agility. Ensure high clarity and strong contrast, with minimal noise. Absolutely no character likeness to any official, copyrighted characters, and no resemblance to recognizable IPs, game assets, or logos.
